name: studio.list_blog_tags
description: Enumerate blog tags on an Actium Studio site. Tags are flat (non-hierarchical) cross-cutting keywords.
whenToUse: Resolve tag_ids for an update_post or create_post call that assigns multiple tags.
Operator is writing a post and wants to reuse existing tags rather than create duplicates.
Autocomplete-style UI: fetch tags matching a prefix to suggest while the operator types.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants hierarchical buckets (nesting, parent/child) — use studio.list_blog_categories; tags are flat.
Caller already has the tag name and the API accepts tag names directly — skip the lookup.
Caller wants to enumerate posts carrying a tag — list posts filtered by tag_id via studio.list_posts, not this skill.
